title: The Last Paradise
writer: Folco Quilici, Ennio Flaiano, Dario Cecchi
actors: Vairia Hatamou, Terei Autoroi, Marii Hatuguto
plot: A 1955 Italian independent film, released in the USA in 1956, which is basically a travelogue telling four stories, each about a different island in the South Pacific. Native customs, tribal rites,ceremonial procedure, courtships,...
